mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW (REVIEW_ID, HOTEL_ID, MEMBER_ID, HOTEL_RESV_ID, RATING, CONTENT) VALUES (TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{hotelId}, #{memberId}, #{hotelResvId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, R.HOTEL_ID AS hotelId, R.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, R.HOTEL_RESV_ID AS hotelResvId, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NAME AS memberName FROM TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW R JOIN TRV_MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE R.HOTEL_ID = #{hotelId} ORDER BY R.REVIEW_ID DESC
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1), 0) FROM TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW WHERE HOTEL_ID = #{hotelId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW WHERE HOTEL_ID = #{hotelId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW WHERE HOTEL_RESV_ID = #{hotelResvId}
